top.title: Putin denounces Nato at scaled-back Victory Day parade
top.summary: The Russian leader used his annual speech to justify his so-called special military operation in Ukraine.

top.title: Iran accuses US of 'reckless military adventure'
top.summary: Abbas Araghchi says the US attacks each time there is a diplomatic solution on the table.

top.title: I will serve - not rule over Hungary, says new PM
top.summary: Nearly a month ago Péter Magyar steered his Tisza party to a landslide victory, sweeping away 16 years of rule by Viktor Orbán.

top.title: How sunburn inspired a new way to store energy
top.summary: Molecules that can capture heat could be a useful technology to decarbonise heating.

top.title: TikTok scales back AI-generated video descriptions after absurd errors
top.summary: While only rolled out to some users, the feature's bizarre AI-generated descriptions were shared widely.

top.title: Instagram privacy tech is turned off today - what does this mean for your DMs?
top.summary: The platform said it would remove end-to-end encrypted messages, a major U‑turn by parent company Meta.

These great digital gifts will arrive just in time for Mother’s Day
